description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001. CLOUD_CODE has completed smoke E2E validation (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9) and produced governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json with pass status for all autonomous loop integrity checks: (1) dispatch role filter in auditor-runner.yml verified present, (2) server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED verified present, (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml verified present with AUDITOR routing, (4) ledger ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 verified with correct schema and commit SHAs, (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain. ANALYST requests AUDITOR perform post-action audit of the smoke report artifact at governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 to confirm autonomous loop integrity validation is complete and the system is ready to advance to the next roadmap phase.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 containing pass status for all five autonomous loop integrity checks with referenced commit SHAs
